commercialRule: Supabase push sync uses a single unambiguous RPC; stale refresh sessions are cleared; Settings branding guards no longer spam errors when state is temporarily unavailable.
releaseNotes: Fixes Supabase error: Could not choose the best candidate function between dsc93696_push_state bigint and integer overloads.
Routes app cloud pushes to dsc93696_push_state_v1032.
Includes required Supabase SQL that drops ambiguous overloaded RPC functions and recreates one clean RPC.
Clears stale Supabase refresh sessions after invalid refresh-token 400 errors.
Adds a safe guard for clinic branding settings when state/settings is temporarily unavailable.
The Electron CSP warning is a development-mode warning and does not show once packaged.
No local app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, or updater logic is deleted.
